name: Border Patrol — Sector Intrusion Response
description: A distributed sensor network detects movement along a remote border sector. AMOS coordinates aerial and ground assets to investigate, track, and respond while keeping a human operator in the loop.
audience: Border security, DHS, infrastructure protection teams

injects.message: SECTOR 7 ACTIVE — Ground sensor network online. Autonomous patrol initiated.
ALERT: Movement detected Sector 7-Bravo. ISR drone FALCON-01 auto-tasked to investigate.
TARGET CLASSIFIED: 1x vehicle + 2x dismounted personnel. Ground robot BADGER-01 dispatched for close inspection.

injects.description: Comms degradation — remote terrain, relay gap

injects.message: WARNING: Comms strength degraded in Sector 7. Mesh relay node repositioning.

injects.description: Second vehicle detected — possible coordinated crossing

injects.message: INTEL UPDATE: Second vehicle detected. Pattern suggests coordinated border crossing. HAL recommends expanding surveillance zone.
OPERATOR REVIEW: All targets under continuous track. Ground team enroute. Requesting commander approval for zone expansion.
MISSION COMPLETE: 3 targets tracked, 0 lost. Sector 7 secured. Full report generated.
